name.zh-CN: 肖像背景：变幻天空 - 测试版

description.zh-CN: 根据当前天气和时间改变肖像背景，同时保留原版的肖像框。这是 Doragoun 原作的 Changing Skies 模组的替代版本。
description.source: Changes the portrait backgrounds according to the current weather and time without changing the vanilla portrait frame. This is an alternative version of Changing Skies, originally made by Doragoun.
